### Education

1. 2020 — National Institute on Aging (NIA) T32 Postdoctoral Fellow, Pathways T32 Training Program. Center for Healthy Aging, Pennsylvania State University
2. 2018 — PhD, Cognitive Psychology, Florida State University
3. 2015 — M.S., Cognitive Psychology, Florida State University
4. 2012 — B.S., Psychology, Florida State University
